name: Network Optimization Agent
note: Estimates based on Azure retail pricing. Actual costs depend on usage, region, reserved instances, and enterprise agreements.

services.name: Azure OpenAI
services.purpose: GPT-4o for network intelligence — anomaly root cause analysis narratives, capacity planning recommendations, self-healing action plan generation, performance degradation reasoning, SLA impact assessment

prod.note: ~1.5M tokens/day, gpt-4o for complex network analysis

enterprise.note: Provisioned throughput, real-time network decision support

services.name: Azure IoT Hub
services.purpose: Telemetry ingestion from 5G/LTE network equipment — cell tower KPIs, RAN metrics, core network health, antenna parameters, backhaul utilization, edge compute status

services.name: Azure Stream Analytics
services.purpose: Real-time network telemetry processing — KPI threshold monitoring, anomaly detection on signal quality metrics, traffic pattern analysis, interference correlation, capacity utilization trending

enterprise.note: 15 streaming units, multi-stream correlation, sub-second latency

services.name: Azure Digital Twins
services.purpose: Network topology digital twin — cell site models, coverage area simulation, capacity planning scenarios, failure propagation modeling, upgrade impact prediction

services.name: Cosmos DB
services.purpose: Network state records, anomaly events, capacity plans, self-healing action logs, cell site configuration history, SLA compliance tracking, incident correlation data

prod.note: Dedicated throughput, change feed for action triggers

enterprise.note: Multi-region, analytical store for historical trend analysis

services.name: Container Apps
services.purpose: Network optimization API — anomaly investigation engine, capacity planner, self-healing orchestrator, what-if simulator, NOC dashboard backend

prod.note: 2 vCPU, 4GB, min 3 replicas for high availability

services.name: Key Vault
services.purpose: Network equipment credentials, SNMP community strings, OSS/BSS integration keys, cell site configuration encryption, audit trail signing keys

services.name: Application Insights
services.purpose: Platform uptime (mission-critical), anomaly detection latency, self-healing success rate, capacity prediction accuracy, API availability, action execution timing

optimization_tips: Use GPT-4o-mini for routine daily network health summaries and standard threshold alerts — reserve GPT-4o for complex multi-cell anomaly root cause analysis and capacity planning recommendations, saving 60% on AI costs
Aggregate IoT Hub telemetry at the edge before ingestion — pre-compute 1-minute KPI averages on cell site edge devices rather than sending raw per-second metrics, reducing message volume by 60x
Right-size Stream Analytics streaming units based on actual network size — most regional deployments process well within 3-5 SUs; monitor SU% utilization and scale down during maintenance windows
Use Digital Twins tiered update frequency — refresh live topology every 5 minutes for active monitoring, every hour for stable cells, and on-demand for capacity planning simulations
Implement Cosmos DB TTL for transient telemetry — raw KPI snapshots expire after 90 days; aggregated trends retained indefinitely; anomaly events retained for 2 years for pattern analysis
Set Azure Cost Management budgets with alerts at 50%, 80%, 100%
